# Auto Repair in Lake Park, FL

> ASE-certified auto repair in Lake Park, FL. Free estimates, honest service, quality work on all makes. Call (561) 249-0094 today.

## Contact
- Phone: (561) 249-0094
- Email: gardenautocare@gmail.com
- Address: 900 Old Dixie Hwy, Lake Park, FL 33403

## Services
  - Diagnostics
  - Brakes &amp; Suspension
  - Maintenance
  - Engine &amp; Cooling
  - Wheel &amp; Tire Balancing
  - Pre-Purchase Inspections
